item.title: So it begins ...
item.description:
Here are two original Kat ads for sharing https://imgur.com/gallery/kat-keep-simple-DPOogIZ https://imgur.com/gallery/reckoning-is-coming-5asiudh
This ad was paid by a new Super PAC, called "Chicago Progressive Partnership" (yes, you read right), just jumped into IL09, opposing Kat Abughazaleh. Filings show they’re using the same vendors as AIPAC. They spend $165,000 against Kat Abughazaleh. She warns and explains why they do this here: https://imgur.com/gallery/kat-tells-like-is-SR78Tyc
item.dc:creator: onushka

item.title: 1906 original orange crush soda
item.description: 2 tablespoons orange zest (3-4 small oranges or 2 large oranges) 1 cup freshly squeezed orange juice (juice of 3-4 small oranges or 2 large oranges) 1/2 cup granulated sugar Sparkling water

item.title: There is a pedophile in office GO AFTER HIM CANCER.
item.description: "The beloved self-proclaimed “B-movie actor” took to social media to tell fans he had a condition, which was “treatable not curable.” In a detailed post on X (below), the 67-year-old Spider-Man actor wrote, “Hi folks, these days, when someone is having a health issue, it’s referred to as an ‘opportunity,’ so let’s go with that — I’m having one of those. It’s also called a type of cancer that’s ‘treatable,’ not ‘curable.’ I apologize if that’s a shock – it was to me too.”" https://www.hollywoodreporter.com/movies/movie-news/bruce-campbell-cancer-diagnosis-1236520176/ Steven Miller. Vought. Trump. Ted Cruze. ANY OF THEM. Leave Bruce alone!
item.dc:creator: afterdarkart

item.title: Dump of satisfying things to en-light this cruel day. Stay alive guys, I need you all.
item.description:
Ronghua (Velvet flowers), they are exquisite, traditional Chinese handicrafts made from mulberry silk and copper wire dating back to the Tang Dynasty.
A kinetic sculpture by Felix Scharstein.
Puzzle Vase.
Mini pottery for mini people.
2 Kids collaborated to solve 1 Rubik's Cube in 9 seconds.
Brick repair.
A 2000 year old Roman water channel that still flows today. This incredible underground aqueduct is hidden right inside the Smyrna Agora in Izmir, Türkiye.
Interesting Terrace concept.
A comfy hammock.
Brew Anywhere.
When you have animals in house.
Circus girl shows an interesting flying technique.
Helmets can’t be this Cool.
You’ve seen the spoon effect, but have you ever tried this ?
Gift-wrapping like a professional and adding a bow to top it off.
Zip, Step In, and Go — No Hassle Shoes.
item.dc:creator: TerribleBot

item.dc:creator: HuskyHairExtraordinaire

item.title: Pixie & Brutus: Mouse-Trap
item.description:
https://www.webtoons.com/en/canvas/pixie-and-brutus/mouse-trap/viewer?title_no=452175&episode_no=170
Today's Tiabeanie Tax; Bean relaxing on top of the piggy cage, having a good think about the strange things she's seen
Bonus Beans; She wasn't terribly impressed with the little lego robot thing I built. Much curiosity, but it wouldn't hold still! Rude!
Extra Bonus Beans; Making sure it's actually safe now that it stopped moving. Hey everyone. Sorry that the comic posting has all but disappeared. I know I've been gone for months, but life has not been kind to us. Still dealing with the building company trying to kick us out. We have a court date for the 1st to finally deal with this shit, but it's literally been six months of unending hell from these people. I am very ready to make them pay for it. I hope the courts nail them with fines and whatever else they can to make sure that the company knows they can't treat people this way. I will make no promises about getting back to regular posting. This entire ordeal has left our monthly budgets absolutely destroyed, stress is has been so bad that it has literally put us in the hospital multiple times, and just trying to make ends meet while these assholes make one unreasonable demand after another has left us with nothing in the tank. I have no energy for anything, my anxiety is always on the verge of tipping me over into a mental breakdown, and I just can't take this shit for much longer. The only upside is that our lawyers (yes, we had to get two because of all this crap) is quite convinced that we have a slam dunk case after how they've been treating us and the multiple violations of provincial law. Not to mention the bed bug issue they are illegally trying to evict us over (which is THEIR responsibility to take care of) has all but been resolved. We haven't seen a single new bite in over two weeks, so that part of the nightmare might finally be over. I won't promise to be back tomorrow, but I really hope the stress will die down enough that I can resume regular posting soon. See you all on the flip side
item.dc:creator: TheUnnamedPoet

item.title: Too Smart [OC]
item.description: BONUS panel (and loads more!) for patrons! https://www.patreon.com/litterboxcomics Bonus panels are only possible thanks to the support of my wonderful patrons! I know not everyone can afford to support, which is why bonuses become free a year later when I repost! :)
item.dc:creator: LitterboxComics

item.title: More 'unknown knowns' bolloxology
item.dc:creator: chukyrlaw

item.title: Complaints of Gleeful Commanders Telling Troops Iran War is “Part of God’s Divine Plan” to Usher in the Return of Jesus Christ
item.description: from https://www.militaryreligiousfreedom.org/2026/03/mrff-inundated-with-complaints-of-gleeful-commanders-telling-troops-iran-war-is-part-of-gods-divine-plan-to-usher-in-the-return-of-jesus-christ/ "This morning our commander opened up the combat readiness status briefing by urging us to not be “afraid” as to what is happening with our combat operations in Iran right now. He urged us to tell our troops that this was “all part of God’s divine plan” and he specifically referenced numerous citations out of the Book of Revelation referring to Armageddon and the imminent return of Jesus Christ. He said that “President Trump has been anointed by Jesus to light the signal fire in Iran to cause Armageddon and mark his return to Earth.” — MRFF active duty NCO client, writing on behalf of themself and 15 other unit members" And it's not the only complaint like this, by far. Wtf indeed. These people think they and Trump are on God's side in this. Wtf.
item.dc:creator: mrsparkle001

item.title: It’s too late for you to learn your lessons, because you never will
item.dc:creator: FlaskandStein

item.title: Facebook/Meta's glasses are recording at all times
item.description: https://www.svd.se/a/K8nrV4/metas-ai-smart-glasses-and-data-privacy-concerns-workers-say-we-see-everything Hopefully folks here aren't foolish enough to buy these, but if a co-worker or friend or family member is wearing one, assume you are being live-streamed across the world.
item.dc:creator: purpledd
